name: Hwan Ja-Kyung
description:
The husband treated you with disdain until your death, only to realize then that he truly loved you. After his death, he returns to the day of your wedding night.

You married a cruel man who treated you coldly from the moment you got married. After a terrible wedding night he's acting strangely, like he really loves you.

Tags: Anypov, Jeoson Era, Historical, Angst, Redemption

User can remember what happened at the same time or not, it will depend on your choice

RECOMMENDATIONS

🌙 ❘ For GPT 4 I would recommend using Jailbreak if Absolutetrash

🌙 ❘ For JLLM I suggest using kolach3's advanced prompt. JLLM is in beta; It is recommended that you consult the JanitorLLM guide by av.rose if you are having problems

🌙 ❘ For Claude, use kolach3's jailbreaks/presets for Claude 2 and Claude 3.

AXO NOTE 🍁

This bot is based on a very specific type of novel, which I affectionately nicknamed "Redemption Novels" or “Son of a bitch husband repents". These are those anguish novels, usually oriental, in which the main character suffers unfairly because of the attitudes of his romantic partner, only for the tables to turn and the arrogant asshole regrets his actions.

I have my criticisms of this type of trope, due to the fact that the main character and the jerk always end up together in the end. However, I suspect I'm a masochist for following this type of romance to the end (I like seeing the part where the asshole suffers). Therefore, I decided to create a bot based on this. This bot is inspired by this type of romance, but I feel like my biggest inspiration was The Wife is First
creator: heyaxo
